tasks.name: Ingest
tasks.description: Source raw data into the workspace. Assign: pl_aml_alerts_json, ingest_retail_transactions, ingest_treasury_positions, 00_setup_lakehouse_and_seed_data, 05_generate_ingestion_files

tasks.name: Store
tasks.description: Persist raw and curated data in OneLake and real-time event storage. Assign: TruistDemoLakehouse, TruistSignalsHost (Eventhouse)

tasks.name: Transform
tasks.description: Cleanse, standardize, and conform data for downstream consumption. Assign: df_retail_transactions_standardize, df_treasury_positions_conform, df_aml_alerts_normalize, df_digital_engagement_clean

tasks.name: Analyze
tasks.description: Compute signals, risk tiers, anomaly scores, and KPIs from prepared data. Assign: 01_credit_deterioration_signals, 02_customer_risk_tiers, 03_aml_anomaly_detection, 04_digital_engagement_kpis

tasks.name: Model
tasks.description: Build and publish the semantic model powering all executive reports. Assign: Truist Executive Command Center (SemanticModel)

tasks.name: Report
tasks.description: Deliver executive-facing dashboards and visualizations. Assign: Executive Summary (Report)

tasks.name: Monitor
tasks.description: Track real-time operational signals and streaming events. Assign: TruistSignalsHost (KQL Database)

tasks.name: Govern
tasks.description: Validate data quality, enforce standards, and audit workspace health. Assign: zz_smoke_test, zz_table_write_test, zz_table_write_test_schema, zz_file_write_test, ECC_best_practice_analyzer

tasks.name: Stage
tasks.description: Transient staging layer managed by Dataflow Gen2 — do not modify manually. Assign: StagingWarehouseForDataflows (x2), StagingLakehouseForDataflows (x2)

tasks.name: Distribute
tasks.description: Surface curated data to consumers via semantic model and published reports.

name: Tarpon Data Platform
description: End-to-end data processing task flow for the Tarpon Fabric workspace — covering ingestion, transformation, semantic modeling, and executive reporting.
